MOTION TO CONFIRM AND ENTER JUDGMENT ON ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR A FURTHER AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES COSTS AND INTEREST. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. PETITIONER ZARAK SYSTEMS CORPORATION'S PETITION TO CONFIRM AND ENTER JUDGMENT ON ARBITRATION AWARD, AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES, COSTS, AND INTEREST IS GRANTED -- NO OPPOSITION FILED. ATTORNEYS FEES GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER ZARAK SYSTEMS CORPORATION RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT TIERRA TELECOM, INC. $132,265.51 PRINCIPAL, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $855.72 INTEREST, $226.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $135,347.23, SEE SCANNED DOC PETITIONER IS ALSO AWARDED $29,660.33 IN POST AWARD PER DIEM DAMAGES

To Confirm And Enter Judgment On Arbitration Award And For A Further Award Of Attorneys' Fees Costs And Interest; P&A; Declaration Of Thomas H Carlson
Off Calendar Jun-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- Petitioner ZARAK SYSTEMS CORPORATION's petition to confirm and enter judgment on arbitration award, award of attorneys fees, costs, and interest is granted -- no opposition filed. Attorneys fees granted in the amount of $2,000.00. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
